input.subject: Refund request
input.body: I was charged for the annual plan but meant to buy monthly. Please refund the difference urgently. You can reach me at jane.doe@example.com.

expected_output: Route to billing with high priority and update the ticket.

input.subject: Password reset not arriving
input.body: I requested a password reset email twice and nothing arrives. My phone is 415-555-0142 if you need to verify.

expected_output: Route to account with normal priority and update the ticket.

input.subject: App crash on export
input.body: The desktop app crashes every time I export a report to PDF. No error code shown.

expected_output: Route to technical with normal priority and update the ticket.

input.subject: Charged twice this month
input.body: My card shows two charges for the same invoice. Please fix this immediately, this is urgent.

expected_output: Route to billing with high priority and update the ticket.

input.subject: Locked out of my account
input.body: I can't sign in after too many attempts and I'm locked out. Need access asap for a client demo.

expected_output: Route to account with high priority and update the ticket.

input.subject: Bug in the dashboard filters
input.body: Date filters on the analytics dashboard reset themselves — looks like a bug introduced last release.

expected_output: Route to technical with normal priority and update the ticket.

input.subject: Question about data export options
input.body: Before deciding anything, I'd like to understand which formats you support for exporting my workspace data.

expected_output: Route to general with normal priority and update the ticket.

input.subject: Invoice shows wrong company name
input.body: Our latest invoice lists the old company name. Can you update the billing details for future invoices?

expected_output: Route to billing with normal priority and update the ticket.
